RecordType.description: The record type under GPIS for federal clients Leads.
RecordType.label: Federal

values.fullName: Sell 25%25 to 50%25 of the investments in my account
Sell 50%25 to 75%25 of the investments in my account
Sell less than 25%25 of the investments in my account
Sell more than 75%25 of the investments in my account
I like to actively manage my own investments
Prefer to let others manage for me
